source_lineage.locator: Note 7: ~13.5M SAFE shares; fair value $183.0M at $13.53 on 2026-03-31
12,081,333 shares outstanding as of May 6, 2026 (cover page)

components.evidence: FACT spin/merger mark: SAFE closed $25.80 on 2023-03-31 (Yahoo; post 0.16 split on merger day), ~$25/share round number. At 13,525,499 implied shares that is $338.1M = $27.99/STHO share vs current Yahoo SAFE $16.93 → $18.95/STHO share (about -32% below deal mark). FACT Q1 10-Q Note 7: ~13.5M shares / 18.8%, FV $183.0M at $13.53 on 2026-03-31. INFERENCE: SAFE owns long-duration ground leases (typically ~99-year; IR decks cite ~91–92 year weighted-average extended lease term), so the equity mark is rate-sensitive — lower discount rates support re-rating toward/above the deal mark. JUDGMENT cases: low ~$12 SAFE forced sale; base near current mark with friction; high ~$25 deal-mark path. Margin Loan $92.8M first-priority pledge (Note 9).
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 12.9777, 'base': 18.4989, 'high': 27.9884}; see calculation_proof graph via net_asset_value@1.0.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: SAFE fails to re-rate with lower rates, or forced sale/collateral path nets below the low case.

source_lineage.locator: MD&A monetizing: loan $16.1M + AFS $38.2M + land $14.4M + two properties $2.7M = $71.4M
12,081,333 shares outstanding as of May 6, 2026 (cover page)

components.evidence: FACT Q1 MD&A monetizing portfolio: loan $16.1M + ten AFS debt securities $38.2M + land $14.4M + two properties $2.7M = $71.4M ($5.91/sh). Zero-carry loans/equity interests disclosed with no assurance of recovery. Q1 land-development sales revenue $11.0M / COS $9.3M; Surfhouse mezz $10.6M repaid 3/27/2026 (8-K). Source: 10-Q MD&A; Note 5/6; 8-K 2026-04-01. INFERENCE from 10-K/10-Q land-sale margins: the $14.4M monetizing land sleeve may realize above carrying; loans/AFS remain nearer mark-to-market/par.
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 3.4987, 'base': 5.3012, 'high': 6.5009}; see calculation_proof graph via probability_weighted_catalyst_nav@1.0.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization is modeled through the five-year wind-down horizon, with specific sale and repayment timing remaining uncertain.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The recovery range applies haircuts to the disclosed loans, AFS securities, land, and properties; the base case relies on repayment and land-sale evidence while zero-carry claims receive no value here.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental development capital is attributed to this monetizing bucket; sale costs and wind-down friction are deducted separately in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: Sale/repayment proceeds imply recovery below $3.50/sh on this bucket.

source_lineage.locator: Q1 L&D $100.5M + RE $70.2M less MD&A monetizing land/other $17.1M = $153.6M residual
12,081,333 shares outstanding as of May 6, 2026 (cover page)

components.evidence: FACT YE2025 10-K Note 5 dispositions: land development revenue vs cost of sales 2025 $46.4M / $28.8M (+$17.6M), 2024 $60.0M / $48.7M (+$11.3M), 2023 $72.4M / $62.7M (+$9.7M). FACT Q1 2026: land development revenue $11.0M vs COS $9.3M (+$1.7M). INFERENCE: actively selling land/lots above carrying cost of sales — GAAP book understates realizable value for the monetizing land/development sleeve. FACT Q1 accum. depreciation: RE $28.784M + L&D $10.547M = $39.3M (~$3.26/sh) — upper bound on pure depreciation add-back for depreciable assets; land itself is not depreciated the same way. FACT 10-K: Company did not sell operating real estate (buildings) in 2025 or 2023 — Asbury hotel/ops premium to book is unproven by closed sales. FACT residual carrying after removing MD&A monetizing land/other ≈ $12.72/sh. Sources: 10-K Note 5; 10-Q Notes 4–5; Item 1 Magnolia/Asbury.
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 4.0049, 'base': 7.5012, 'high': 13.019}; see calculation_proof graph via net_asset_value@1.0.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Land and operating-real-estate realization is modeled over the five-year wind-down horizon; no immediate sale of the remaining operating real estate is assumed.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The base case gives partial credit to carrying value because 2023 through Q1 2026 land and lot sales exceeded cost of sales, while the low case allows slow or distressed realization and the high case approaches carrying.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: The component is valued after its carrying-value haircut; no separate development budget is added, and fee and sale-friction deductions remain in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: Monetization clears below $4/sh after costs on this residual bucket.

12,081,333 shares outstanding as of May 6, 2026 (cover page)

components.evidence: FACT Note 9: Safe Credit Facility $115M at 8.00% (10% if incremental drawn), maturity March 2028; Margin Loan $92.8M at SOFR+3.50%, PIK option (+25bp after PIK), secured by first-priority pledge of Safe Shares, maturity March 2028, delayed-draw capacity ~$15.8M. Total debt obligations net $207.0M ($17.13/sh). CORRECTED: prior -1.19/sh was wrong; (cash-debt)/shares ≈ -12.0. Exact LTV/collateral-posting triggers not numerically disclosed (only that Mar-2025 amendment eased them).
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': -17.5109, 'base': -17.0997, 'high': -16.5171}; see calculation_proof graph via net_asset_value@1.0.

components.falsifier: Debt claims exceed $17.50/sh or collateral call forces SAFE sale below low stake value.

source_lineage.locator: Note 1 fee schedule: $7.5M current term + 2% GBV ex-SAFE; illustrative wind-down sum ~$19.7M
12,081,333 shares outstanding as of May 6, 2026 (cover page)

components.evidence: FACT Note 1: annual auto-renewal each March 31; terminate without cause with ≥180 days notice and ≥2/3 independent trustee vote. Before 2027-03-31, termination fee = $55M minus fees paid (≈$5M overhang after $50M paid through 2026-03-31). After 2027-03-31, that termination-fee trigger no longer applies to without-cause terminations under the disclosed formula. FACT current term fee $7.5M; thereafter 2% GBV ex-SAFE. JUDGMENT: H2 2026 is the practical window to run a manager RFP so a replacement can be effective at/after the 2027-03-31 fee cliff — not an immediate free option today. Safe Governance Agreement still restricts certain SAFE-share transfers. Cash taxes de minimis (DTA allowance to zero; $0.2M paid in 2025).
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': -2.4997, 'base': -1.4023, 'high': -0.3995}; see calculation_proof graph via net_asset_value@1.0.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: Fees, termination payment, or tax leakage exceed $2.50/sh present value.

components.evidence: FACT MD&A: group of loans/equity interests recorded at zero carrying value; no assurance of recovery. components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 0.2003, 'high': 2.0031}; see calculation_proof graph via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Any recovery is treated as a contingent result within the five-year wind-down horizon, not as current cash or a contracted asset sale.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The low case assigns zero, the base assigns only $0.20 per share, and the high case requires incremental recovery from zero-carry claims or entitlement surplus beyond Magnolia/Asbury carrying cases.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental owner-funded development spend is credited to this option; any continuing holding, entitlement, management, or sale costs are captured in the existing operating and wind-down reserve components.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: No surplus to carrying and zero-carry assets remain worthless.

judgments.label: Safehold Inc. equity stake (~13.525M shares)
judgments.evidence: FACT spin/merger mark: SAFE closed $25.80 on 2023-03-31 (Yahoo; post 0.16 split on merger day), ~$25/share round number. At 13,525,499 implied shares that is $338.1M = $27.99/STHO share vs current Yahoo SAFE $16.93 → $18.95/STHO share (about -32% below deal mark). FACT Q1 10-Q Note 7: ~13.5M shares / 18.8%, FV $183.0M at $13.53 on 2026-03-31. INFERENCE: SAFE owns long-duration ground leases (typically ~99-year; IR decks cite ~91–92 year weighted-average extended lease term), so the equity mark is rate-sensitive — lower discount rates support re-rating toward/above the deal mark. JUDGMENT cases: low ~$12 SAFE forced sale; base near current mark with friction; high ~$25 deal-mark path. Margin Loan $92.8M first-priority pledge (Note 9).

judgments.label: MD&A monetizing loans, AFS securities, land, other properties
judgments.evidence: FACT Q1 MD&A monetizing portfolio: loan $16.1M + ten AFS debt securities $38.2M + land $14.4M + two properties $2.7M = $71.4M ($5.91/sh). Zero-carry loans/equity interests disclosed with no assurance of recovery. Q1 land-development sales revenue $11.0M / COS $9.3M; Surfhouse mezz $10.6M repaid 3/27/2026 (8-K). Source: 10-Q MD&A; Note 5/6; 8-K 2026-04-01. INFERENCE from 10-K/10-Q land-sale margins: the $14.4M monetizing land sleeve may realize above carrying; loans/AFS remain nearer mark-to-market/par.

judgments.evidence: FACT YE2025 10-K Note 5 dispositions: land development revenue vs cost of sales 2025 $46.4M / $28.8M (+$17.6M), 2024 $60.0M / $48.7M (+$11.3M), 2023 $72.4M / $62.7M (+$9.7M). FACT Q1 2026: land development revenue $11.0M vs COS $9.3M (+$1.7M). INFERENCE: actively selling land/lots above carrying cost of sales — GAAP book understates realizable value for the monetizing land/development sleeve. FACT Q1 accum. depreciation: RE $28.784M + L&D $10.547M = $39.3M (~$3.26/sh) — upper bound on pure depreciation add-back for depreciable assets; land itself is not depreciated the same way. FACT 10-K: Company did not sell operating real estate (buildings) in 2025 or 2023 — Asbury hotel/ops premium to book is unproven by closed sales. FACT residual carrying after removing MD&A monetizing land/other ≈ $12.72/sh. Sources: 10-K Note 5; 10-Q Notes 4–5; Item 1 Magnolia/Asbury.

After 2027-03-31, that termination-fee trigger no longer applies to without-cause terminations under the disclosed formula. FACT current term fee $7.5M; thereafter 2% GBV ex-SAFE. source_lineage.locator: MD&A monetizing: loan $16.1M + AFS $38.2M + land $14.4M + two properties $2.7M = $71.4M
12,081,333 shares outstanding as of May 6, 2026 (cover page)

components.evidence: FACT Q1 MD&A monetizing portfolio: loan $16.1M + ten AFS debt securities $38.2M + land $14.4M + two properties $2.7M = $71.4M ($5.91/sh). Zero-carry loans/equity interests disclosed with no assurance of recovery. Q1 land-development sales revenue $11.0M / COS $9.3M; Surfhouse mezz $10.6M repaid 3/27/2026 (8-K). Source: 10-Q MD&A; Note 5/6; 8-K 2026-04-01. INFERENCE from 10-K/10-Q land-sale margins: the $14.4M monetizing land sleeve may realize above carrying; loans/AFS remain nearer mark-to-market/par.
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 3.4987, 'base': 5.3012, 'high': 6.5009}; see calculation_proof graph via probability_weighted_catalyst_nav@1.0.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization is modeled through the five-year wind-down horizon, with specific sale and repayment timing remaining uncertain.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The recovery range applies haircuts to the disclosed loans, AFS securities, land, and properties; the base case relies on repayment and land-sale evidence while zero-carry claims receive no value here.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental development capital is attributed to this monetizing bucket; sale costs and wind-down friction are deducted separately in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: Sale/repayment proceeds imply recovery below $3.50/sh on this bucket.

source_lineage.locator: Q1 L&D $100.5M + RE $70.2M less MD&A monetizing land/other $17.1M = $153.6M residual
12,081,333 shares outstanding as of May 6, 2026 (cover page)

components.evidence: FACT YE2025 10-K Note 5 dispositions: land development revenue vs cost of sales 2025 $46.4M / $28.8M (+$17.6M), 2024 $60.0M / $48.7M (+$11.3M), 2023 $72.4M / $62.7M (+$9.7M). FACT Q1 2026: land development revenue $11.0M vs COS $9.3M (+$1.7M). INFERENCE: actively selling land/lots above carrying cost of sales — GAAP book understates realizable value for the monetizing land/development sleeve. FACT Q1 accum. depreciation: RE $28.784M + L&D $10.547M = $39.3M (~$3.26/sh) — upper bound on pure depreciation add-back for depreciable assets; land itself is not depreciated the same way. FACT 10-K: Company did not sell operating real estate (buildings) in 2025 or 2023 — Asbury hotel/ops premium to book is unproven by closed sales. FACT residual carrying after removing MD&A monetizing land/other ≈ $12.72/sh. Sources: 10-K Note 5; 10-Q Notes 4–5; Item 1 Magnolia/Asbury.
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 4.0049, 'base': 7.5012, 'high': 13.019}; see calculation_proof graph via net_asset_value@1.0.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Land and operating-real-estate realization is modeled over the five-year wind-down horizon; no immediate sale of the remaining operating real estate is assumed.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The base case gives partial credit to carrying value because 2023 through Q1 2026 land and lot sales exceeded cost of sales, while the low case allows slow or distressed realization and the high case approaches carrying.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: The component is valued after its carrying-value haircut; no separate development budget is added, and fee and sale-friction deductions remain in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: Monetization clears below $4/sh after costs on this residual bucket.

components.evidence: FACT Note 9: Safe Credit Facility $115M at 8.00% (10% if incremental drawn), maturity March 2028; Margin Loan $92.8M at SOFR+3.50%, PIK option (+25bp after PIK), secured by first-priority pledge of Safe Shares, maturity March 2028, delayed-draw capacity ~$15.8M. Total debt obligations net $207.0M ($17.13/sh). CORRECTED: prior -1.19/sh was wrong; (cash-debt)/shares ≈ -12.0. Exact LTV/collateral-posting triggers not numerically disclosed (only that Mar-2025 amendment eased them).
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': -17.5109, 'base': -17.0997, 'high': -16.5171}; see calculation_proof graph via net_asset_value@1.0.

components.falsifier: Debt claims exceed $17.50/sh or collateral call forces SAFE sale below low stake value.

source_lineage.locator: Note 1 fee schedule: $7.5M current term + 2% GBV ex-SAFE; illustrative wind-down sum ~$19.7M
12,081,333 shares outstanding as of May 6, 2026 (cover page)

components.evidence: FACT Note 1: annual auto-renewal each March 31; terminate without cause with ≥180 days notice and ≥2/3 independent trustee vote. Before 2027-03-31, termination fee = $55M minus fees paid (≈$5M overhang after $50M paid through 2026-03-31). After 2027-03-31, that termination-fee trigger no longer applies to without-cause terminations under the disclosed formula. FACT current term fee $7.5M; thereafter 2% GBV ex-SAFE. JUDGMENT: H2 2026 is the practical window to run a manager RFP so a replacement can be effective at/after the 2027-03-31 fee cliff — not an immediate free option today. Safe Governance Agreement still restricts certain SAFE-share transfers. Cash taxes de minimis (DTA allowance to zero; $0.2M paid in 2025).
components.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': -2.4997, 'base': -1.4023, 'high': -0.3995}; see calculation_proof graph via net_asset_value@1.0.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: Fees, termination payment, or tax leakage exceed $2.50/sh present value.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Any recovery is treated as a contingent result within the five-year wind-down horizon, not as current cash or a contracted asset sale.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The low case assigns zero, the base assigns only $0.20 per share, and the high case requires incremental recovery from zero-carry claims or entitlement surplus beyond Magnolia/Asbury carrying cases.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental owner-funded development spend is credited to this option; any continuing holding, entitlement, management, or sale costs are captured in the existing operating and wind-down reserve components.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.
components.falsifier: No surplus to carrying and zero-carry assets remain worthless.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Catalyst-backed asset value
failure_modes: gross proceeds used before tax and senior claims

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: Component changes are classified from observable differences in quantity, comparable method, probability, timing, capital, evidence, and schedule scope.
